title: Run an online schema change
description: Apply DDL to a live table in small, weakly-locking steps with CONCURRENTLY and NOT VALID/VALIDATE.
body: Steps: 1. Classify the change by lock and rewrite cost. 2. For indexes use CREATE/DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY outside a transaction. 3. For constraints add them NOT VALID first (fast, weak lock), then VALIDATE CONSTRAINT separately (no exclusive lock). 4. For new columns prefer nullable or constant-default forms that avoid a rewrite. 5. Set lock_timeout and statement_timeout so a blocked step fails fast. Rollback point: each step is independently reversible; clean up any INVALID index. Validation: writes continue throughout, no step holds ACCESS EXCLUSIVE long, and constraints end up valid.
